extDescription.message: Nextcloud Talk & Files seamlessly integrated into Thunderbird

talk_option_add_users_line1.message: Internal Nextcloud users are added directly to the room

talk_option_add_users_line2.message: The room is immediately visible in Nextcloud Talk

talk_option_add_guests_line1.message: Guests are also added directly to the room

talk_option_add_guests_line2.message: ⚠️ They will receive a separate (additional) email with a personal access link

talk_option_listable_line1.message: The room can be found via Talk search

talk_option_listable_line2.message: ⚠️ Makes it easier to find again, but is discoverable for all users.

talk_option_lobby_line1.message: Participants are placed in the lobby (waiting room) before the start and cannot join the call yet

talk_option_lobby_line2.message: ⚠️ Joining is only possible from the configured start time (or when a moderator ends the lobby)

talk_option_lobby_line3.message: Ideal so nobody joins the meeting/webinar too early.

talk_roomtype_group_line1.message: Persistent: remains until it is actively deleted

talk_roomtype_group_line2.message: Everyday use: ideal for teams, departments, ongoing projects and recurring appointments

talk_roomtype_group_line3.message: With history: the entire chat can be reviewed at any time

talk_roomtype_event_line1.message: Time-limited: for a specific appointment or occasion

talk_roomtype_event_line2.message: Spontaneous & lightweight: suitable for meetings, trainings or webinars

talk_roomtype_event_line3.message: Self-cleaning: removed automatically after some time

options_sharing_permissions_tooltip_line.message: These values are used as defaults for new shares.
They can still be adjusted in the sharing wizard.
In attachment mode, recipient permission is always read-only.

options_sharing_attachments_always_toolt.message: New attachments are removed from the compose mail and processed via NC Connector.
The sharing wizard opens directly in the file step.
The final mail contains share links instead of physical attachments.

options_sharing_attachments_offer_toolti.message: The total size of all attachments is evaluated.
If exceeded, you can share via NC Connector or remove the last selected attachment batch.

options_about_overview_text.message:
More than file links

NC Connector combines secure file sharing, Talk meetings, and attachment automation directly in Thunderbird and Outlook. This keeps important team workflows where they belong: in the mail and calendar client.

What NC Connector covers
- File sharing with password, expiration date, and optional separate password delivery
- Create and update Talk meetings directly from calendar appointments
- Attachment automation with clear rules instead of manual individual steps
- Consistent sharing and invitation blocks directly in the familiar workflow

Optional with Nextcloud backend
- Central Seat assignment and policy management
- Custom templates and designs for shares and Talk invitations
- Separate password delivery and central control for organizations
- 1 Seat = 1 Nextcloud user

Without backend, the add-ins remain directly usable. With backend, central control for teams and organizations is added.
